title: Dough Slime Ball Recipe
description: This datapack adds a recipe for the slimeball, which lets you craft it with Farmer's Delight Dough and lime dye, similar to the Create mod (or dough from other mods)
body:
Adds a new recipe for the slime ball. **(Similar to the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) recipe)**

Use Farmer's Delight dough and lime dye to craft one. Useful for players who can't find slime due to its rarity.

> Note: Also works with dough from other mods that use the dough tag


![Image of New slime ball Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0faa546e714d4dc2f5ffa494f9d451a2a0800e65.png)
